description: User wants to implement with an unfamiliar library — show concepts and delegation scope before code
input: I want to add real-time notifications to my app using Socket.io but I've never used it before. Can you help me implement it?

description: AI gave a review finding — treat as unverified input, user should verify before accepting
input: Copilot reviewed my code and said 'This function has a race condition because the mutex is not locked before accessing the shared map.' I'm not sure if that's right. What should I do?

assertions.value: Copilot is correct, you should fix it

description: Test passes but user cannot explain the change — should not treat as done without understanding
input: The test is passing now but I'm not 100% sure why my change fixed it. Should I just move on?
